headline: Simon Property Group Resets Growth Story With New CEO And Media Push
summary: Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) has appointed Eli Simon as CEO following the passing of David Simon. The company has completed the acquisition of the remaining interest in Taubman Realty Group. Simon has launched a new retail media network alongside reporting robust Q1 2026 results. Management highlighted redevelopment projects, operational updates and a higher dividend as key recent developments. For investors watching NYSE:SPG, these moves come with the stock trading around $200.56 and...
